rationale: Trump's contradictory claims about an Iran deal and Tehran's denial create domestic political noise; China detaining another US academic adds to bilateral tension — both are continuations of existing stories with no major new escalation.

top_events.title: Trump claims Iran deal near; Tehran says nothing finalized; leaked terms called fake
top_events.summary: Contradictory signals between Trump and Tehran over a nuclear deal create political confusion domestically. No breakthrough means no oil price relief; credibility questions for the administration persist.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for alleged espionage
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China on espionage charges — a continuation of the pattern raising concerns about Americans traveling to or engaging with China professionally.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating US consulate attack
top_events.summary: A Canadian officer was shot during follow-up investigation of the US consulate attack in Toronto. Raises ongoing security concerns around US diplomatic facilities in North America.
